inputs.expression:
import subprocess
result = subprocess.run(['hostname', '-I'], capture_output=True, text=True)
ips = result.stdout.strip().split()
out1 = f"Connect with: ssh -i /path/to/private_key root@{ips[0] if ips else 'IP not found'}"
